---
cache: true
number-depth: 2
callout-appearance: simple
callout-icon: false
---

# Random Variables and Distributions {#sec-3}

{{< include ch03/_03-01-rvs-discrete.qmd >}}

{{< include ch03/_03-02-rvs-continuous.qmd >}}

{{< include ch03/_03-03-cdfs.qmd >}}

{{< include ch03/_03-04-bivariate.qmd >}}

{{< include ch03/_03-05-marginal.qmd >}}

{{< include ch03/_03-06-conditional.qmd >}}

{{< include ch03/_03-07-multivariate.qmd >}}

{{< include ch03/_03-08-fns-of-one-rv.qmd >}}

{{< include ch03/_03-09-fns-of-multiple-rvs.qmd >}}

{{< include ch03/_03-10-markov-chains.qmd >}}

{{< include ch03/_03-11-exercises.qmd >}}
